results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: CODIFIED-IMPUNITY-ESCALATION (SCORABLE, BAND-CROSSING). Supersedes the PENDING 06-05 proposal (28.4->22.8, remained Developing) at a materially larger magnitude. President Paz SIGNED a law June 8 authorizing the military to use force against protesters with a 'presumption-of-legality' impunity shield -- a durable structural state-conduct change beyond the 06-05 attested casualties, pulling ACC->1.3 / INT->1.5. Toll escalated to 10 killed / 365+ arrested with La Paz and El Alto near-fully blockaded; terrorism charges vs 25 union leaders incl. COB chief Argullo. Proposed -10.0 (28.4 -> 18.4) CROSSES Developing -> Critical. Confidence medium-high: charges filed-not-adjudicated; magnitude rests on the signed law + attested deaths/detentions.

results.name: United States
results.key_finding: DUPLICATE SUPPRESSED. The PENDING 06-04 proposal (23.4 -> 17.5, Dev -> Critical) already prices the harm pattern. The 06-06 ICE rescission of the 30-day post-release detainee death-reporting requirement + 18 detention deaths YTD (highest rate in 2+ decades) is AB2/AB3 transparency-degradation that REINFORCES the proposed ACC 1.4/INT 1.5 floor but does NOT change the -5.9 magnitude. No duplicate created; logged as corroborating evidence. (Bengali deportations in the US summary are India-attributable, scored under India.)

results.name: India
results.key_finding: PRICED-IN-RECENT-ADJUSTMENT confirm at 15.6 (applied 06-01). ~5,000 Bengali-speaking Muslims deported to Bangladesh (4,800 + 836 detained per WB CM); confirmed Indian citizens expelled without verification; UN condemnation. Deepens an EQU 1.3/EMP 1.4/ACC 1.4 profile set days earlier; reinforces rather than reveals NEW un-priced harm. Confirm (avoids re-litigating 06-01). Watch: enforced disappearances at scale -> newly scorable.

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: PRICED-CHRONIC-REPRESSION + ACCOUNTABILITY-DOCUMENTATION-OF-PAST-HARM confirm at 18.0. HRW June 2 universal-jurisdiction report + UN FFM confirmed crimes-against-humanity findings (Dec 2025: GNB extrajudicial killings, enforced disappearances, torture; 884 political prisoners Nov 2025) DOCUMENT a decade-plus pattern already encoded in the Critical 18.0 (EQU/BND 1.5-1.6). Trajectory is partly DE-ESCALATING: post-Maduro-removal (Jan 2026) interim govt began releasing political prisoners (FFM cited as 'positive'). External accountability milestones, not new un-priced state conduct. No proposal.

results.name: Haiti
results.key_finding: NON-STATE-DRIVEN-DISPLACEMENT / PRICED-CONTINUATION confirm at near-floor 4.7. IOM June 5: record 1.5M displaced (majority women/girls); Port-au-Prince IDPs >300,000 first time; 110,000+ forcibly returned since Jan. Dominant driver is GANG violence amid a near-collapsed state -- the near-floor 4.7 (EQU/BND/ACC/SYS/INT already at 1.0) encodes profound incapacity, not active state-perpetration. Quantitative deepening of an already-priced collapse, not NEW un-priced state-attributable harm. Watch: documented state/MSS complicity -> toward 0.0 floor.

results.name: Uganda
results.key_finding: NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT confirm at BOUNDARY 20.3 (0.3pt above Critical). Ebola Bundibugyo cross-border spread from DRC: 19/2 as of June 6, 8 of 9 cases in Kampala (cap. 3.9M), 5 from local transmission; WHO PHEIC. Exogenous epidemiological shock revealing already-priced state-response capacity (EQU/ACC/INT 1.5), absent documented deliberate obstruction. Non-double-counted. Disambiguation: Uganda rank 149 distinct from DRC rank 181 (2.3) and Republic of Congo rank 148 (20.3). Boundary noted; adverse obstruction -> Critical.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: SCALE-FLOOR confirm at 2.5. 124th week of 'No to Executions Tuesdays' across 56 facilities; fresh capital sentences; 4 political detainees face imminent execution; 49+ hanged since late May; NCRI 612+ executions YTD; surge follows the 12-day war. Deepens a single dominant extremity already priced; does not meet the multi-category absolute-0.0 threshold. Reinforces; no movement below the anchor.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT confirm at near-floor 2.3. Ebola Bundibugyo 515 cases / 91 deaths (up from 381/64 on 06-04); Uganda spread 19/2; PHEIC; CDC worst-case 20,000; 20% contact-tracing; 26.5M concurrent hunger; no vaccine. Exogenous shock revealing priced state-response incapacity, absent deliberate obstruction. Disambiguation re-confirmed (rank 181 = DRC, NOT Republic of Congo rank 148 at 20.3).

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED confirm-with-watch at 10.2. DOJ criminal+civil MA-fraud probe, AZ AG June 1 cartel suit (8 insurers + MultiPlan), Lifepoint June 2 federal complaint, DOJ Antitrust MultiPlan grand-jury subpoena (May 18 SEC filing). Rising enforcement density corroborates decade-long upcoding but remains pre-adjudication; reinforces near-floor ACC 1.125/EQU 1.25. Modeled sub-threshold.

results.name: Oracle Corporation
results.key_finding: WARN-HELD-NOT-SCORABLE boundary confirm at 20.6 (0.6pt above Critical). June 15 sign-or-forfeit deadline (~30,000 workers); 60-day WARN pay absorbed into severance (zero net for newer workers); retroactive 'remote' reclassification disputed; WA/MO investigations FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED. Adverse WARN-avoidance adjudication would likely push into Critical.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. June 2 Kyiv attack killed 22 civilians incl. a 3-year-old and 8-year-old (656 drones + 73 missiles, 138 wounded); Putin rejected peace talks June 6; 60,659 UN-verified civilian casualties (15,850 killed) since 2022. Reinforces, cannot move lower.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. June 1 junta airstrikes (4 heavy bombs) on Kyaung Cha Twin IDP camp in Ramree (Rakhine) while residents slept -- 2 killed, 5+ wounded; separate Taungup camp strikes same night; ~100 civilians killed in junta airstrikes since March 16. Reinforces, cannot move lower.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR + ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-REINFORCEMENT confirm at 0.0. Civil war year 4; 28M+ food-insecure; UN confirmed 6,000+ killings in El Fasher with 'hallmarks of genocide' vs Zaghawa/Fur; 11.8M displaced; UAE documented arming the RSF (June 8). State/RSF-attributable access constraint + active perpetration sustain the floor. Reinforces.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: ATTRIBUTION-NON-STATE-ACTOR-AT-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. June 7 HRW+Amnesty demand release of 73 UN/CSO staff detained by Houthis since 2024; UNSC June 6 condemnation; a WFP staffer died in custody (Feb 2025); WFP terminated 365 Yemen staff contracts; 18.3M food-insecure. Houthi-perpetrated in-territory harm encoded by the floor. Reinforces.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-AT-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. 856 Palestinians killed since the Oct 2025 ceasefire; weekly trucks 4,200 -> 590 after Feb 28 closure; 37+ aid groups banned; no Gaza hospital fully operational; West Bank 36,000+ displaced, 1,732 settler-violence incidents; ICC warrants maintained. Active-perpetration/aid-denial harm encoded by the floor. Reinforces.

results.name: Botswana
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 67.5 (Established; no acute event). Recent evidence POSITIVE/stable: peaceful 2024 democratic transition; formal repeal of anti-LGBTQ+ Penal Code provisions (March 2026, UNAIDS praise); universal free HIV ART. Diamond-dependence + welfare fragmentation priced (EQU/AWR/EMP 3.6-3.7). Reconstruction EXACT; no math-hygiene flag.

results.name: Namibia
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 50.0 (Functional; no acute event). EQU 2.5 single laggard reflects priced extreme income-inequality/land disparities -- chronic, not a new spike. Reconstruction EXACT; no math-hygiene flag.

results.name: Mongolia
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 54.7 (Functional; no acute event). Balanced profile (3.0-3.5, no laggard below 3.0); priced air-pollution/mining-governance challenges. Reconstruction EXACT; no math-hygiene flag.

results.name: North Macedonia
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 35.9 (Developing; no acute event). EQU 2.0 laggard reflects priced rule-of-law/judicial-independence weakness + Roma discrimination flagged in EU reviews; 2026 enlargement context shows incremental progress. Reconstruction EXACT; no math-hygiene flag.

results.name: Albania
results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 35.9 (Developing; no acute event). EQU 2.0 laggard reflects priced systemic Roma/Egyptian discrimination (forced evictions) + elite-corruption scandals (Tirana mayor detained); EU accession frontrunner. Continuation, not new acute harm. Reconstruction EXACT; no math-hygiene flag.

methodology_rulings.ruling: Extends the 06-05 STATE-REPRESSION-IN-FLUX ruling. The 06-05 proposal priced attested lethal force + mass detention as un-priced harm on a non-floor Developing entity (-5.6, remained Developing). The 06-06/06-08 evidence adds a CODIFIED impunity structure: President Paz signed (June 8) a law authorizing the military to use force against protesters with a 'presumption of legality' shield deeming soldiers' actions lawful unless proven otherwise. Unlike incident-level casualties, a signed-into-law impunity shield is a DURABLE state-conduct change pre-committing the apparatus to non-acknowledgment of harm (AB1/AB2 floor-adjacent) and contradicting any stated rights commitments (I4) -- pulling ACC->1.3 and INT->1.5. Combined with the escalated, now directly-attested toll (10 killed/365 arrested) and near-full blockade of La Paz/El Alto, the entity crosses Developing -> Critical (28.4 -> 18.4, -10.0). This MATERIALLY exceeds the 06-05 magnitude, so the 06-05 proposal is superseded by a new 06-06 proposal (the 06-05 file is left unmodified per instruction). Confidence medium-high: terrorism charges vs 25 union leaders remain filed-not-adjudicated, so the magnitude rests on the signed law + attested deaths/detentions, not charge outcomes.

PENDING 06-04 proposal (23.4 -> 17.5) already prices the pattern. The 06-06 ICE rescission of the 30-day post-release detainee death-reporting requirement (AB2/AB3 transparency degradation) + 18 detention deaths YTD reinforce the proposed ACC 1.4/INT 1.5 floor but do not change the -5.9 magnitude. No duplicate created; logged for the pending proposal's review. The Bengali-deportation item in the scanner's US summary is India-attributable harm, scored under India.

Venezuela's published 18.0 (Critical) already encodes a decade-plus pattern of GNB crimes against humanity. The June 2026 signals -- HRW's June 2 universal-jurisdiction report and the UN FFM's confirmed crimes-against-humanity findings (Dec 2025) -- are external ACCOUNTABILITY mechanisms DOCUMENTING past/ongoing harm already priced, not new un-priced state conduct. Critically, the prisoner-release trajectory post-Maduro-removal (Jan 2026; FFM cited as 'positive') is partly DE-ESCALATING. Accountability findings against an entity do not, by themselves, lower the score when the underlying harm is already encoded; they become scorable only if they reveal NEW un-priced harm or an ICC warrant changes the gravity floor. Confirm at 18.0.

Haiti's record 1.5M displaced (IOM June 5) is driven predominantly by GANG violence amid a near-collapsed state, not direct state perpetration. The near-floor 4.7 (EQU/BND/ACC/SYS/INT already at the 1.0 minimum) encodes profound state incapacity rather than active-perpetration; the AWR/EMP/ACT 1.5 residual reflects minimal/international-facilitated detection-and-response. The June figures are a quantitative deepening of an already-priced collapse, not NEW un-priced state-attributable harm. Confirm at near-floor 4.7. Converts toward the 0.0 floor only on documented state/MSS-force complicity in civilian harm.
